heading: Irrewillipe East vs Irymple — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Irrewillipe East, Victoria and Irymple, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Irymple has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Irrewillipe East (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Irrewillipe East or Irymple safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Irrewillipe East has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Irymple scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Irrewillipe East scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Irymple scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Irrewillipe East or Irymple?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Irymple has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
